zh.lifeSummary: 當Ragnhild de L'Isles於1174年出生在蘇格蘭布特阿朗時，她的父親Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles27歲，母親Fonia Moray29歲。她於1210年與Séamus MacSomerled Macrory在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1218年在蘇格蘭維托史爾享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ragnhild de L'Isles于1174年出生在苏格兰布特阿朗时，她的父亲Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles27岁，母亲Fonia Moray29岁。她于1210年与Séamus MacSomerled Macrory在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1218年在苏格兰維托史爾享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: L'Isles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire) and Scottish (Angus and Perthshire): variant of   Iles   (see   Lyle  ).

variants.name: Iles
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Lisle   (see   Lyle  ).

nameMeanings.name: Ragnhild
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + hildr ‘battle’.

variants.name: Ragnild
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + hildr ‘battle’.

en.lifeSummary: When Ragnhild de L'Isles was born in 1174, in Arran, Bute, Scotland, her father, Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles, was 27 and her mother, Fonia Moray, was 29. She married Séamus MacSomerled Macrory in 1210, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died about 1218, in Wigtownshire, Scotland, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ragnhild de L'Isles est née en 1174, à Arran, Bute, Écosse, son père, Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Fonia Moray, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Séamus MacSomerled Macrory en 1210, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1218, à Wigtownshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ragnhild de L'Isles 1174 in Arran, Bute, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles 27 und ihre Mutter Fonia Moray 29. Sie hat 1210 in Scotland Séamus MacSomerled Macrory geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1218 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Wigtownshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ragnhild de L'Isles è nata il nel 1174 nel Arran, Bute, Scotland, sua padre, Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Fonia Moray, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Séamus MacSomerled Macrory nel 1210, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1218, nel Wigtownshire, Scotland, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ragnhild de L'Islesが1174年にスコットランドブトアランで生まれた時，父Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Islesは27歳，母Fonia Morayは29歳であった。1210年にスコットランドでSéamus MacSomerled Macroryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1218年にスコットランドウィグトウンシュアイアで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ragnhild de L'Isles(이)가 1174년 스컷랜드 부트 아란에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Fonia Moray(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1210년 스컷랜드에서 Séamus MacSomerled Macrory(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1218년 스컷랜드 위그타운실르에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ragnhild de L'Isles nasceu em 1174, em Arran, Bute, Scotland, seu pai, Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Fonia Moray, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Séamus MacSomerled Macrory em 1210, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1218, em Wigtownshire, Scotland, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ragnhild de L'Isles родилась в 1174 г. в местности арран, бут, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Fonia Moray, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Séamus MacSomerled Macrory в 1210 г. в местности Шотландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1218 г. в местности вигтоуншир, Шотландия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ragnhild de L'Isles nació en 1174, en Arran, Bute, Scotland, su papá, Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Fonia Moray, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Séamus MacSomerled Macrory en 1210, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1218, en Wigtownshire, Scotland, a la edad de 45 años.
